tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Everything I Do I Do It For You

content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Lay a whisper on my pillow,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
leave a winter on the ground[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
I wake up lonely, there's air of silence[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
in the bedroom and all around[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Touch me now, I close my eyes and dream away[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
It must have been good, but I lost it somehow[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
From the moment we touched till the time had run out[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Make believing, we're together[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
that I'm sheltered by your heart[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
But in and outside I've turned to water[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
like a teardrop in your palm[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
And it's a hard winter's day, I dream away[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
It was all I wanted, now I'm living without[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
It's where the water flows, it's where the wind blows[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] (?)                   [ch]Gm[/ch] (?)   [ch]Dm[/ch]
It must have been good, but I lost it somehow[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
It must have been love, but it's over now, from the moment we touched[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
till the time had run out. Yeah, it must have been love[/tab]

(repeat and fade)
